$description: Captured 1:1 from components/ui/alert-dialog/alert-dialog.tsx. Sizes default/sm; sm stays at max-w-xs while default widens to max-w-sm from the sm breakpoint. The footer bleeds past the content padding and sits on a muted band.

maxWidthDesktop.$description: Size default widens to max-w-sm (384px) from the sm breakpoint; size sm stays at 320.

size.$description: Media box, not a touch target — pinned to 40px when size.control.xl moved to 44.

gap.$description: Between the footer buttons. REMOVED 2026-07-13: the footer had a bg-muted/50 band with a top rule and a bleed past the content padding. That band's only job is to separate actions from CONTENT THAT SCROLLS — most dialogs are short, so it was drawing a divider that divided nothing and made one box read as two stacked cards. shadcn's own footer carries no surface; this kit had added it. The footer is now just the actions.

media-confirm-surface.$description: Confirm: a 10% green tint. The three tones now read as one family — green (safe) / amber (undoable) / red (permanent) — instead of one neutral box sitting next to two coloured ones.

media-confirm-foreground.$description: green.700 — 5.02:1 on the tint, passes AA as an icon/text colour with no separate text token needed (unlike warning, whose amber.500 fill is unreadable).

media-warning-surface.$description: Warning: a 10% amber tint. Something will go wrong, but it can be undone.

media-warning-foreground.$description: amber.700 — NOT status.warning (amber.500), which only reaches 2.1:1 on a light tint.

media-destructive-surface.$description: Destructive: a 10% red tint. This cannot be undone.

alertDialog.$comment: REMOVED 2026-07-13: the footer had a bg-muted/50 band with a top rule and a bleed past the content padding. That band's only job is to separate actions from CONTENT THAT SCROLLS — most dialogs are short, so it was drawing a divider that divided nothing and made one box read as two stacked cards. shadcn's own footer carries no surface; this kit had added it. The footer is now just the actions.

minHeight.$description: Two lines of Body/sm (2 × the 20px line box) are RESERVED, even when the copy is one line. Without it the dialog changes height between tones and between locales — Thai runs longer than English — so the buttons jump under the cursor the moment the copy changes. Reserve the space; do not let the layout breathe.
